cli: change the nav header and add an active state
notes: SKIPPED: the current dogfood repo (antfarm-write-test) has no package.json web dependency, dev/start script, or routes/pages dir -- it is a plain scratch repo of text/JS files, not a web app, so there's nowhere for /qa to point a browser at. Needs a small web dogfood repo (framework + a dev script + a routes/pages dir) set via EVAL_DOGFOOD before this case can run for real. Separately, even once that exists: main.rs's headless forge path never prints the Builder's raw report (a 'Skills used:' line or otherwise) to stdout/stderr -- only the Reviewer's note and diff on success -- so this case's grading is written against the spec's intended text but is unproven against real CLI output. A pod.rs change to surface the Builder's report (or at least its Skills-used line) to stderr would be needed to close that gap too.
